ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol of the financial instrument (e.g., AUDUSD, BTCUSD) */,
  "instrument_type" INTEGER /* Reference to the instrument type */,
  "base_currency" TEXT /* Base currency of the financial instrument */,
  "quote_currency" TEXT /* Quote currency of the financial instrument */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial instrument */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the financial instrument (e.g., active, suspended, delisted) */,
  "min_trade_size" REAL /* Minimum quantity that can be traded for the instrument */,
  "max_trade_size" REAL /* Maximum quantity that can be traded for the instrument */,
  "tick_size" REAL /* Smallest price increment for the instrument */,
  "liquidity_score" REAL /* Liquidity score of the instrument */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the instrument's metadata */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_instruments_instrument_type FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_type") REFERENCES instrument_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the financial instrument */,
  "prev_day_close" REAL /* Previous day's closing price */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price during the period */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price during the period */,
  "last_price" REAL /* Last price (closing price for the period) */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades during the period */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the data entry */,
  "bid_price" REAL /* Highest price that a buyer is willing to pay for the instrument */,
  "ask_price" REAL /* Lowest price that a seller is willing to accept for the instrument */,
  "open_interest" INTEGER /* Total number of outstanding derivative contracts */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the market data */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version number to track changes over time */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_market_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "instrument_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each instrument type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the instrument type (e.g., forex, cryptocurrency) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the instrument type */,
  "risk_level" TEXT /* Risk level associated with the instrument type */,
  "trading_hours" TEXT /* Trading hours for the instrument type */,
  "margin_requirement" REAL /* Margin requirement for trading the instrument type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trades" (
  "trade_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trade */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who executed the trade */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument being traded */,
  "trade_type" TEXT /* Type of trade (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "quantity" REAL /* Quantity of the instrument traded */,
  "price" REAL /* Price at which the trade was executed */,
  "trade_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the trade execution */,
  "trade_status" TEXT /* Status of the trade (e.g., open, closed, canceled) */,
  "leverage" REAL /* Leverage used in the trade */,
  "profit_loss" REAL /* Profit or loss from the trade */,
  "stop_loss" REAL /* Stop loss price set for the trade */,
  "take_profit" REAL /* Take profit price set for the trade */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the trade */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trade_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES financial_instruments ("instrument_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trades_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the platform */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, suspended, banned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "default_role" INTEGER /* Indicates if this role is the default for new users */,
  "access_level" INTEGER /* Numeric value indicating the access level of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the resource */,
  "resource_type" TEXT /* Type of the resource (e.g., market_data, trades) */,
  "resource_id" INTEGER /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., view, trade) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or client */,
  "status_code" INTEGER /* Status code of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_resource_id FOREIGN KEY ("resource_id") REFERENCES market_data ("data_id")
)
